//: Entra External ID (CIAM) config. Real values live in user-secrets (dev) / Key Vault (prod), NEVER committed. See README for the exact keys to set.

EntraExternalId.//ApiScopeUri: The Application ID URI of the API app registration, e.g. api://<api-client-id>

//Swagger: Public client id + scope Swagger UI uses to acquire a user token via auth-code+PKCE.

ConnectionStrings.//ButterflyDb: Set in user-secrets (dev) or Key Vault (prod). Azure SQL prod prefers passwordless managed identity: Server=tcp:<srv>.database.windows.net,1433;Database=Butterfly;Authentication=Active Directory Default;Encrypt=True;
